title: ollama/ollama

summary: Official NPM package for Ollama JavaScript library with over 50k weekly downloads.

summary: Official Python package for Ollama with over 100k monthly downloads.

summary: Official Docker images and configurations for running Ollama in containers.

summary: Helm charts for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-chat

summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper for Ollama with additional features and utilities.
